qry:select.name: qryDetail
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PE.c_empresa, PE.e_numero_legajo, MAX(PE.c_tipo_documento) as c_tipo_documento, MAX(PE.c_nro_documento) as c_nro_documento, MAX(PE.c_sexo) as c_sexo, MAX(PE.f_nacim) as f_nacim, MAX(PER.d_ape_y_nom) as d_ape_y_nom, MAX(DOMIC.d_calle) as d_calle, MAX(DOMIC.e_numero) as e_numero, MAX(DOMIC.c_postal) as c_postal, MAX(PE.f_ingreso) as f_ingreso, MAX(PE.f_egreso) as f_egreso, MAX(PE.c_estado_civil) as c_estado_civil, MAX(NAC.d_nacionalidad) as d_nacionalidad, SUM(TLP.n_totsret) as Haberes_Con_Aportes, SUM(TLP.n_totnsret) as importeNoRemun, SUM(TLP.n_totsac) as importeSac, MAX(CONC.n_valor) as n_valor FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ99_RECIBOS as REC, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as PEREMP, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, ORG03_EMPRESAS AS EMP, ORG12_NACIONALID as NAC, (select PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_personal, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_calle, PER01_DOMIC_PER.e_numero, PER01_DOMIC_PER.c_postal from PER01_DOMIC_PER where PER01_DOMIC_PER.l_domic_fiscal = 1) as DOMIC, (select LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.n_valor from LIQ96_CONCEPTOS, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER join LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo INNER LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_concepto_ddo where LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto = \'70005901\') as CONC JOIN LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, PER.c_personal INNER PE.c_personal, EMP.c_empresa INNER PE.c_empresa, PER.oi_personal LEFT OUTER DOMIC.oi_personal, PER.oi_nacionalidad LEFT OUTER NAC.oi_nacionalidad, TLP.oi_tot_liq_per LEFT OUTER CONC.oi_tot_liq_per, PEREMP.oi_personal INNER PER.oi_personal, PEREMP.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa WHERE LIQ.c_estado = \'F\' AND PEREMP.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@empresa} AND LIQ.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@p_periodo} AND PE.c_tipo_personal != \'3\' GROUP BY PE.c_empresa, PE.e_numero_legajo ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryVariables
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PE.c_empresa, PE.e_numero_legajo, MAX(CONC_LIQ_P.n_valor) as n_valor, TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TOT.c_total FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ99_RECIBOS as REC, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as PEREMP, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, ORG03_EMPRESAS AS EMP, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER as CONC_LIQ_P, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS as CONC_L, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as CON, LIQ30_CONC_SUM as CON_SUM, LIQ30_TOTALES as TOT JOIN LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, PER.c_personal INNER PE.c_personal, EMP.c_empresa INNER PE.c_empresa, CONC_LIQ_P.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, CONC_LIQ_P.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CONC_L.oi_concepto_ddo, TOT.oi_total INNER CON_SUM.oi_total, CON_SUM.oi_concepto INNER CON.oi_concepto, CON.c_concepto INNER CONC_L.c_concepto WHERE TOT.c_total IN (\'SIAFCAAP_SAC\', \'SIAFCAC_SAC\',\'SIAFCA_SAC_MES\') AND LIQ.c_estado = \'F\' AND LIQ.e_periodo = {#PARAMIN:@p_periodo} AND PE.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND PE.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@e_numero_legajo} GROUP BY TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, PE.c_empresa, PE.e_numero_legajo, TOT.c_total ')/ROWS/ROW

EMPTY.mess: No se encontraron registros. Por favor valide que los legajos estén asociados al sindicato correcto y que las liquidaciones del período estén cerradas.
